sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FLY INVESTOR ALERT: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Announces that Firefly Aerospace Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against Firefly Aerospace Inc. (Nasdaq: FLY) and its officers. The lawsuit alleges violations of federal securities laws, claiming Firefly's offering documents contained untrue statements regarding demand for its Spacecraft Solutions and the operational readiness of its Alpha rocket program. Investors who purchased Firefly securities between August 7, 2025, and September 29, 2025, are encouraged to join the legal action and have until January 12, 2026, to request appointment as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: |Understanding Momentum Shifts in (ONON)
feed.summary: |This article analyzes momentum shifts for On Holding Ag Class A (NASDAQ: ONON), highlighting a strong near and mid-term sentiment but a weak long-term outlook. It identifies resistance testing and outlines three distinct AI-generated trading strategies with specific entry, target, and stop-loss levels for position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging. The analysis also provides multi-timeframe signal strengths, support, and resistance levels for ONON.

feed.title: F5 (FFIV): Assessing Valuation After Expanded NetApp Partnership Targets AI Performance and Post‑Quantum Security
feed.summary: F5 (FFIV) has enhanced its partnership with NetApp to boost AI data throughput and improve post-quantum cybersecurity. Despite recent share price gains and a strong long-term shareholder return, the company is still considered 9.3% undervalued with a narrative fair value of $291.50, driven by its AI-focused offerings and potential for continued growth. However, slowing software adoption or security breaches could impact its future performance and valuation.

feed.title: Assessing Abbott (ABT) Valuation After New Lingo CGM Expansion and Protein-Glucose Data Release
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) has expanded its Lingo glucose sensor to Android and released new data on protein intake's impact on glucose control. While analysts suggest a 15% upside, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates the stock may be overvalued. The article explores different valuation perspectives and potential risks for Abbott.

feed.title: Old Republic (NYSE: ORI) declares $2.50 special dividend, updates buyback capacity

The company has also repurchased $47 million in shares during Q4 and has $864 million remaining in its repurchase authorization. Over the last five years, Old Republic has returned over $5.0 billion to shareholders and reduced shares outstanding by more than 20%.

feed.title: Philip Morris International Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend of $1.47 Per Share
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE: PM) has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.47 per common share. This dividend is payable on January 14, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 26, 2025, with the ex-dividend date also on December 26, 2025. The company continues to advance its smoke-free future initiatives, emphasizing its investment in developing and commercializing innovative smoke-free products.

feed.title: PROPWR Secures Distributed Microgrid Contract With Coterra Energy and Adds 190 Megawatts in New Orders
feed.summary: ProPetro Holding Corp.'s PROPWR division has secured a significant contract with Coterra Energy Inc. to provide turnkey power for distributed microgrids in the Permian Basin, with deployment starting in Q1 2026. This agreement boosts PROPWR's committed capacity to over 220 megawatts and has led to an additional order for 190 megawatts of equipment. The company anticipates higher capital expenditures for 2026, projected between $250 million and $275 million, to support its rapid expansion.

feed.title: Shoe Carnival Announces New Share Repurchase Program

These actions reflect the company's commitment to shareholder returns and its strategy to expand its Shoe Station banner. Despite stable financials and attractive valuation, the AI Analyst Spark rates SCVL as Neutral due to declining sales and profit margins, alongside bearish technical indicators.

feed.title: T-Mobile US elevates Jon Freier to COO amidst AI and 6G focus
feed.summary: T-Mobile US has appointed Jon Freier as its new Chief Operating Officer, filling the vacancy left by Srini Gopalan, who recently became CEO. Freier, who previously led the carrier's consumer group, will now oversee T-Mobile's market operations, technology initiatives, and digital transformation. His appointment comes as the company focuses on leveraging AI for operational efficiencies and developing 6G technologies, particularly for applications like physical AI in automated factories.

The company's future performance hinges on maintaining key technical levels and broader macroeconomic signals, particularly end-market demand.

feed.title: Chubb to cut up to 20% of workforce in ‘radical’ AI drive
feed.summary: Chubb plans to reduce its global workforce by up to 20% over the next three to four years, impacting about 43,000 employees. This initiative is part of a "radical" digital transformation aimed at automating 85% of its major underwriting and claims processes using AI and other digital tools. The goals are to digitize most core functions, redesign workflows for efficiency, and achieve significant expense savings, aligning with similar trends across the insurance sector.

feed.title: Nomura Holdings Reports November 2025 Share Buyback Progress

This buyback program, initiated in April 2025, has achieved 66.8% of its target, aiming to enhance shareholder value and optimize capital structure. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates NMR as Neutral, noting solid valuation and positive technicals despite concerns about high leverage and negative cash flows.

feed.title: Ameren stock rating downgraded by KeyBanc on data center uncertainty
feed.summary: KeyBanc downgraded Ameren Corp. from Overweight to Sector Weight due to concerns about the lack of near-term hyperscaler commitments for data centers in Missouri, despite the state's potential. Although Ameren trades at a premium valuation and its stock may be overvalued by InvestingPro's Fair Value model, the company boasts a 2.92% dividend yield and has raised its dividend for 12 consecutive years. Recent strong financial results and a new rate structure for high-usage customers were also highlighted.
